nasb.text: that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give to you a spirit of wisdom and of revelation in the knowledge of Him.

esv.text: that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give you the Spirit of wisdom and of revelation in the knowledge of him,

cnv.text: 求我們主耶穌基督的　神，榮耀的父，賜給你們智慧和啟示的靈，使你們充分地認識他，

ccb.text: 我求我们主耶稣基督的上帝——荣耀的父把赐智慧和启示的灵给你们，好使你们更深地认识祂。

csbs.text: 愿我们主耶稣基督的神——荣耀的父，赐给你们智慧和启示的灵，使你们能真正地认识他。
